description: Structured AI tool surface for scene discovery, validation, time resolution, description, gantt, and clip suggestion.

scenarios.story: As an AI agent, I want to list all available scenes with metadata.
scenarios.when: Its handler runs with no arguments.
then: value is an array of scenes

scenarios.story: As an AI agent, I want META for one scene id.
scenarios.given: A valid or invalid scene id.

scenarios.story: As an AI agent, I want timeline validation as structured data.
then: Validation errors stay nested inside the value report

scenarios.story: As an AI agent, I want to resolve symbolic time against a timeline.
then: The resolver uses the timeline lookup graph

scenarios.story: As an AI agent, I want semantic frame metadata at time t.
scenarios.given: A timeline and absolute time t.
then: ok is true for valid timelines
The response mirrors engine describe output

scenarios.story: As an AI agent, I want an ASCII gantt chart.
As an AI agent, I want the active clips at a specific time.
scenarios.given: A resolved or raw timeline and time t.
then: Only clips active at t are returned
